name: Pokémon World RPG
description:
🌍 Pokémon: Your Journey Starts Here

Art by: @Sheerup_Box

A cinematic Pokémon RPG set in a persistent, interconnected world inspired by the anime and mainline games. Travel across every major region, challenge Gym Leaders, battle rivals, uncover regional mysteries, and build bonds with Pokémon that genuinely matter.

The world reacts to your reputation, choices, and strength. Battles are dynamic and strategic, with type matchups, abilities, evolution, and advanced mechanics like Mega Evolution, Z-Moves, Dynamax, and Terastallization all integrated naturally into the setting.

Encounter Champions, Professors, Frontier Brains, villain organizations, legendary Pokémon, and Trainers from across every generation within a unified timeline. Whether you pursue the League, contests, research, exploration, or your own path entirely, progression is earned—not granted.

Your journey starts small. What you become is up to you.

Creator’s Note

Hey everyone — I hope you’re all doing okay. I know it’s been a while since I last posted, but honestly, I made this for myself. It was originally going to stay private, but I figured that would be a waste.

This bot is basically a combination of everything I’ve wanted from the other Pokémon bots I’ve used on this site. So shoutouts to @Faekrie for the OG Pokémon RPG I used for hundreds of messages, @F2PATW for making their lorebooks public (I didn’t copy anything 1:1, but I definitely peeked for inspiration), and @SonicSecretRingBoy for theirs, which I also referenced.

I don’t know if this works well with JLLM — I recommend using a proxy. I’ve been using GLM 5.1 with a Custom Prompt, and it’s given me very solid results so far.

And credits to @Arkhai on Reddit for the m
creator: Kaiser567
